title: Savory Tender Nostalgic Jamaican Beef Stir-fry
description: A tender and flavorful dish featuring lean minced beef stir-fried with a blend of aromatic spices for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: 1 lb (450g) lean ground beef
ingredients.notes: Use extra-lean ground beef for a healthier option.

ingredients.name: 1 medium onion, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: Add some crunch and sweetness to the dish.

ingredients.name: 3 garlic cloves, minced
ingredients.notes: Aromatics enhance the flavors of the stir-fry.

ingredients.name: 1 tsp allspice (mixed spice)
ingredients.notes: Gives a warm, comforting flavor that reminds you of home.

ingredients.name: 1/2 tsp ground ginger
ingredients.notes: Adds a spicy kick and unique taste to the dish.

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp smoked paprika (optional)
ingredients.notes: Optional for those who like a smoky flavor in their dishes.

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic and allspice (or smoked paprika if using). Stir-fry for an additional minute until fragrant.
Increase heat to high and add ground beef. Break apart any clumps with a spatula and stir continuously until the meat is fully cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove from heat and serve hot over rice or noodles.
Optional: Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
